name: Kharkiv (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the historic field of the city arms — fertility and abundance of the Sloboda Ukraine

description: A green field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Kharkiv: a gold shield bearing a caduceus crossed with a cornucopia.
history: The city flag was approved by the Kharkiv City Council in September 1995. The arms — a caduceus crossed with a cornucopia on a green field — were granted to the city in 1781 by Catherine II and symbolise commerce (caduceus) and agricultural abundance (cornucopia). Kharkiv is Ukraine's second-largest city and historic capital of Sloboda Ukraine.

features.role: arms of Kharkiv — caduceus and cornucopia on a gold shield
